DESCRIPTION: Common Cloud Controls Catalog (CCC) for Azure
REQUIREMENTS_DESCRIPTION: When an attempt is made to modify data on the service or a child resource, the service MUST block requests from unauthorized entities.

REQUIREMENTS_ATTRIBUTES_SECTION: CCC.Core.CN05 Prevent Access from Untrusted Entities

DESCRIPTION: Common Cloud Controls Catalog (CCC) for Azure
REQUIREMENTS_DESCRIPTION: When a policy is created or updated that grants a principal permission to assume a role or impersonate a service identity, the principal MUST NOT contain a wildcard or be public/anonymous.
REQUIREMENTS_ATTRIBUTES_FAMILYDESCRIPTIO: Controls that restrict who can access and modify IAM resources.
REQUIREMENTS_ATTRIBUTES_SECTION: CCC.IAM.CN03 Restrict Role Assumption / Delegation
REQUIREMENTS_ATTRIBUTES_SUBSECTIONOBJECT: Limit which principals can assume a role or impersonate a service identity to only those required. This prevents unintended cross-account or public access by securing the "who can act as this identity" boundary.
